ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax category (e.g., Tax, Interest, Penalty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tax category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tax category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tax category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax type (e.g., Central Tax, State/UT Tax, Integrated Tax, Cess) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tax type is active */,
  "rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the tax type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tax type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tax type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax type */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "is_reconciled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction has been reconciled */,
  "reconciliation_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was reconciled */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tax invoice */,
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated payment receipt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES tax_invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_receipt_id FOREIGN KEY ("receipt_id") REFERENCES payment_receipts ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES tax_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES tax_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the business unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the business unit is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the business unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the department belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the department is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance team, auditor, executive) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax invoice */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., Central Tax, State/UT Tax) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the invoice has been paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_invoices_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment receipt */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the receipt is for */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Receipt number */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date of the receipt */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, cheque) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the receipt */,
  "is_reconciled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the payment has been reconciled */,
  "reconciliation_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was reconciled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the receipt was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_receipts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reconciliation_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reconciliation statement */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being reconciled */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the reconciliation statement */,
  "reconciled_amount" REAL /* Amount reconciled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reconciliation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reconciliation statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reconciliation statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reconciliation statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reconciliation_statements_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
